title: rb
text: rb Set the maximum size of the TCP receive buffer, in kilobytes. USYS$TCP_PARAMS { = } rb= MaximumReceiveBufferKB Arguments MaximumReceiveBufferKB —maximum TCP receive buffer. The default varies per vendor and normally it does not need to be changed. Use TCP send and receive buffers can be set in all assignment files. Description For more information, see sb . Related Links sb Set the maximum size of the TCP send buffer, in kilobytes. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
